mapper.update:
UPDATE oms_order SET delivery_sn = CASE id
WHEN #{item.orderId} THEN #{item.deliverySn}
END, delivery_company = CASE id
WHEN #{item.orderId} THEN #{item.deliveryCompany}
END, delivery_time = CASE id
WHEN #{item.orderId} THEN now()
END, `status` = CASE id
WHEN #{item.orderId} THEN 2
END WHERE id IN
#{item.orderId}
AND `status` = 1
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, oi.id item_id, oi.order_id item_order_id, oi.order_sn item_order_sn, oi.product_id item_product_id, oi.product_pic item_product_pic, oi.product_name item_product_name, oi.product_brand item_product_brand, oi.product_sn item_product_sn, oi.product_price item_product_price, oi.product_quantity item_product_quantity, oi.product_sku_id item_product_sku_id, oi.product_sku_code item_product_sku_code, oi.product_category_id item_product_category_id, oi.promotion_name item_promotion_name, oi.promotion_amount item_promotion_amount, oi.coupon_amount item_coupon_amount, oi.integration_amount item_integration_amount, oi.real_amount item_real_amount, oi.gift_integration item_gift_integration, oi.gift_growth item_gift_growth, oi.product_attr item_product_attr, oh.id history_id, oh.order_id history_order_id, oh.operate_man history_operate_man, oh.create_time history_create_time, oh.order_status history_order_status, oh.note history_note FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN oms_order_operate_history oh ON o.id = oh.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id} ORDER BY oi.id ASC,oh.create_time DESC
